summary.intent: Install and vendor the gstack skill toolkit into the moltis project, mapping each skill to the appropriate Stokowski lifecycle stage in CLAUDE.md.
summary.outcome: gstack was vendored at .claude/skills/gstack, CLAUDE.md was updated with a skills table and stage mapping, and a fix was made to add the missing /design-consultation skill to the stage mapping table after code review flagged the omission.

repo: Project uses Stokowski for lifecycle orchestration with stages: investigate, implement, code-review, merge, post-ship
Skill symlinks are gitignored and recreated locally by running ./setup — teammates must run cd .claude/skills/gstack && ./setup after cloning
node_modules and browse/dist/ are excluded from git tracking; 118 vendored files (~1.2 MB) are tracked directly
CLAUDE.md is the canonical location for documenting available skills and their Stokowski stage mappings

code.finding: gstack section added mapping skills to Stokowski stages; /design-consultation was initially omitted and added in a follow-up fix commit

workflow: Linear API key was unavailable in this workspace, so the code review was posted as a GitHub PR comment instead
Stokowski runs agents in headless mode with no human in the loop — agents must post blockers to Linear and stop rather than asking questions
Code review stage caught a missing skill in the stage mapping table, triggering a rework run (Run 3) of the implement stage
gstack version inconsistency (VERSION file says 0.5.0, SKILL.md says 1.1.0) exists upstream but was treated as non-blocking

friction: Linear API key not available in the workspace, preventing direct Linear comment posting — review had to be posted as a GitHub PR comment instead
Upstream gstack has a version inconsistency between VERSION file (0.5.0) and SKILL.md (1.1.0), creating minor confusion
The /design-consultation skill was present in the vendored tree but missed in the initial CLAUDE.md stage mapping, requiring a rework run
open_items: /design-consultation skill was added to CLAUDE.md but its Stokowski lifecycle stage placement should be confirmed — it was not explicitly assigned to a stage in the transcript
Vendored CHANGELOG.md and TODOS.md from upstream gstack may confuse contributors — consider removing or noting they are upstream docs
Upstream gstack version inconsistency (VERSION vs SKILL.md) was noted but not resolved
browse binary is compiled for macOS arm64 (Bun 1.2.19) — cross-platform teammates will need to recompile
